GM:(0,0,0)  A:(0,0,1/2)  H:(1/3,1/3,1/2)  K:(1/3,1/3,0)  L:(1/2,0,1/2)  M:(1/2,0,0)
GM:(0,0,0)  A:(0,0,1/2)  H:(1/3,1/3,1/2)  K:(1/3,1/3,0)  L:(1/2,0,1/2)  M:(1/2,0,0)
GM1+  GM1-  GM2+  GM2-  GM3+  GM3-  GM4GM5  GM6GM7  GM8  GM9  A1+  A1-  A2+  A2-  A3+  A3-  A4A5  A6A7  A8  A9  H1  H2  H3  H4H5  H6  K1  K2  K3  K4K5  K6  L1+  L1-  L2+  L2-  L3L4  L5L6  M1+  M1-  M2+  M2-  M3M4  M5M6
